content:
PUBLISH

## Editorial Checklist Review

| # | Criterion | Status | Assessment |
|---|-----------|--------|------------|
| 1 | **STRUCTURE** | ✅ PASS | Follows 7-section outline exactly: Executive Summary, Technical Primer, Public Health Applications, Evidence Quality, Health Equity, Implementation Roadmap, Conclusion |
| 2 | **AUDIENCE FIT** | ✅ PASS | Tone is professional, vocabulary appropriate (SVI, SDOH, Cochrane, confidence intervals), depth suitable for public health practitioners |
| 3 | **EXAMPLES** | ✅ PASS | 5 examples integrated: GISAID surveillance, Cochrane review teams, hospital float pool, vaccine allocation case study with metrics, equity subgroup analysis |
| 4 | **DATA** | ✅ PASS | Specific data: 60% time reduction, 6-18 month review compression, case study with 95% CIs (-89%, -42%, -57%), Q4 2024 timeline |
| 5 | **ENGAGEMENT** | ✅ PASS | Opens with concrete statistic ("60% reductions in time-to-insight") immediately establishing relevance |
| 6 | **CONCLUSION** | ✅ PASS | Clear 3-point call to action: evaluate workflows, establish validation protocols, engage stakeholders early |
| 7 | **LENGTH** | ✅ PASS | ~1,850 words (within 1200-2200 range) |
| 8 | **FLOW** | ✅ PASS | Smooth transitions between sections; surveillance → synthesis → allocation flows logically; equity discussion bridges technical and implementation sections |

---

All 8 criteria pass. The article is structurally sound, appropriately targeted for public health professionals, includes concrete examples with quantified outcomes, opens with an engaging hook, and closes with actionable next steps.
